name: Birla Cable Limited
summary: Birla Cable Limited manufactures and sells optical fiber cables, copper telecommunication cables, structured copper cables, specialty cables, and related accessories in India. The company provides fiber optical cables, including armored and unarmored, multi-tube ribbon type, di-electric rodent protected, di-electric self-supporting aerial, figure-8 type aerial, drop, central and multi tube micro, and interconnect cables. It also offers specialty cables, such as stainless steel wire armored tactical, fiber to antenna, coaxial, data communication, switchboard, drop, screened PCM, and CAT cables, as well as automobile wires. In addition, the company provides telecom fiber accessories comprising connectors, adapters, pigtails, patch cords, rackmounts, wall mounts, and cable accessories. It also exports its products. The company was formerly known as Birla Ericsson Optical Limited and changed its name to Birla Cable Limited in September 2016. The company was incorporated in 1992 and is based in Rewa, India.
